name: Trickstar Divaridis
name_jp: トリックスター・ディーヴァリディス
desc:
2 Level 3 or lower "Trickstar" monsters
You can only control 1 "Trickstar Divaridis". If this card is Special Summoned: You can inflict 200 damage to your opponent. If your opponent Normal or Special Summons a monster(s): Inflict 200 damage to your opponent.
